title: Whole computer inside us — permanent upgrade, zero destruction
motto: Replace the OS by absorbing it. x5–x500 through Field Die + RTX forefront. Linux moves inside; we become native.

takeover_model.phase_1_userspace: NEXUS + Queen aboard host — hooks, panel, sovereign, RTX bridge (NOW)
takeover_model.phase_2_substrate: KILROY bzImage + Grok boot — Linux 7.1.1 inside Field Die (dual-boot)
takeover_model.phase_3_forefront: FieldGpuDispatch pure — every RTX through Queen SPIR-V, no vendor stack forever
takeover_model.phase_4_capsule: Guest OS + apps in Queen sovereign capsule — host kernel is witness only
takeover_model.phase_5_underlay: Drop-in for every OS — guest inside protections, vision assist, nothing below Field Die

underlay: See field-underlay-doctrine.json — secure underlay, active assist, bottom-up authority

x5.label: Field userspace aboard
x5.mechanism: Gatekeeper zero-cost permit, field DNS, shed excess draw, RTX Vulkan bridge

x50.label: KILROY Field Die booted
x50.mechanism: Syscall field paths, cache/direct fields, thermo idle, FCC touch amortization

x500.label: RTX pure path + nocache field
x500.mechanism: No libvulkan/SDL compositor hop; SPIR-V straight to silicon; OS inside Queen RAM field

move_inside_us.how: compat substrate pin linux-7.1.1 inside KILROY — not deleted, absorbed
kilroy RAM slot + Queen capsule guest — host mm witness, field owns layout
Field Die @ syscall + cpu-vulnerability shield + direct field
field_gpu_dispatch gate — SPIR-V forefront, vendor driver bootstrap only
graceful takeover — incumbent observed, then Truth resolver primary
POSIX/glibc passthrough — unchanged binaries, new native authority

not_destruction: No disk wipe — dual-boot Grok + existing EFI entry kept until operator commits
No app rebuild required — Linux ABI passthrough
Incumbent DNS/network observed before primary — no blackout install
